name: Drumcode
why_it_belongs: Scene-defining techno institution (est. 1996). A long game, not a cold target.

name: Experts Only
requirements: Submit via the Trackstack portal linked from expertsonlyrecs.com
why_it_belongs: John Summit's label — peak of the current scene.

name: Black Book
requirements: Send up to 5 tracks via the on-site Trackstack portal
why_it_belongs: Chris Lake's label — a Beatport #1 machine.

name: Catch & Release
requirements: Send up to 5 tracks via the Trackstack portal on followthefishtv.com (the DEMOS page)
why_it_belongs: Fisher's label — massive reach and chart dominance.

name: Repopulate Mars
requirements: Private SoundCloud or Dropbox links ONLY (no Google Drive / WeTransfer) | Max 4 demos at once; use a private playlist for multiple | Turn downloads ON | Prefer extended/full mixes over radio edits
sub_labels: South Of Saturn; North Of Neptune
why_it_belongs: Where Mau P broke through. Openly accepts demos.

name: Dirtybird
requirements: Upload via the Label-Worx 'DIRTYBIRD DemoBox' page | No feedback offered on all demos; they contact you if signing
why_it_belongs: Fun, quirky lane; a known career-launcher.

name: Hellbent
why_it_belongs: Cloonee's label — built for unknowns; charts constantly.

name: Three Six Zero
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Open submissions; growing fast (Dom Dolla's home).

name: Hot Creations
requirements: Historically: send a private SoundCloud link to the 'hotcreationsdemos' account
why_it_belongs: Jamie Jones's label — deep scene credibility.

name: Solid Grooves
why_it_belongs: UK tech house institution (est. 2015, London).

name: Sola
why_it_belongs: Solardo's label (Manchester, UK) — consistent charting; email demos welcome.

name: Toolroom
requirements: Upload via the on-site portal (powered by LabelRadar) | They listen to everything but cannot reply to each; contact you if interested
why_it_belongs: Solid distribution and a long track record (Mark Knight).

name: Defected
formats: WAV only; streamable links: SoundCloud / Dropbox / WeTransfer
requirements: Streamable links only | WAV format only | Do NOT include artwork or promo materials | Submissions not following the guidelines are auto-deleted
why_it_belongs: Huge catalogue; one submission effectively covers ~11 sub-labels.

name: Knee Deep In Sound
why_it_belongs: Hot Since 82's label — a less-competitive melodic lane.

name: Suara
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | No sendspace / yousendit / wetransfer links
why_it_belongs: Coyu's label — darker tech house niche.

name: Club Sweat
requirements: Submit via the Sweat It Out DropTrack portal
why_it_belongs: Sweat It Out's house imprint — Australian reach; good for emerging artists.

name: Space Yacht
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal | Also: tracks reviewed live on twitch.tv/spaceyacht and on the 'Tune Reactor' on-air reaction series
why_it_belongs: Reviews demos live on Twitch — the most transparent route in the scene.

name: Glasgow Underground
requirements: Send the right music to the right place (see Kevin McKay's '7 tips for sending a demo')
why_it_belongs: Kevin McKay's label — prolific Beatport charting and famously open/responsive to demos.

name: Snatch! Records
why_it_belongs: Riva Starr's label — consistent tech house charting and a known route for new producers.

name: Crosstown Rebels
genre_tags: tech house; deep house; melodic house
requirements: Submit via the on-site Demos page or the demo A&R email
why_it_belongs: Damian Lazarus's influential underground label — deep scene credibility (Get Lost / Day Zero).

name: Saved Records
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Nic Fanciulli's label — strong tech house pedigree and booking reach.

name: Moon Harbour
requirements: Submit via the Trackstack portal (or the demo email)
why_it_belongs: Long-running Leipzig tech house institution (since 2000) with steady Beatport presence.

name: Desert Hearts
requirements: Submit via the Trackstack portal
why_it_belongs: Beloved US house/techno collective and festival brand — 'House, Techno & Love'.

name: Box of Cats
requirements: Submit via the on-site form / Trackstack (artist name, full name, email, track title, SoundCloud link)
why_it_belongs: Demo-friendly bass/tech house imprint that actively breaks new artists.

name: Cuttin' Headz
why_it_belongs: The Martinez Brothers' label — explicitly 'always on the lookout for new talent'.

name: Country Club Disco
requirements: Submit when the demo form is open (e.g. the 'Caddyshack' Tech/Bass House window)
why_it_belongs: Golf Clap's demo-friendly label; runs a recurring 'Demo Tapes' series for unknowns.

name: Anjunadeep
genre_tags: melodic house; progressive house; deep house
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Globally prominent melodic/progressive house label (Anjuna / Above & Beyond family).

name: Confession
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal (demo email also published)
why_it_belongs: Tchami's label (Paris, 2015) — a leading future/bass house brand.

name: Higher Ground
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Diplo's house label — high-profile and growing, with major booking/streaming reach.

name: Night Bass
why_it_belongs: AC Slater's label — the defining home of bass house.

name: Diynamic
requirements: 320kbps MP3 | Do not send more than 3 tracks at once | Promos go to solomunpromo@diynamic.com (not demos)
why_it_belongs: Solomun's label — one of the most prestigious melodic/tech house brands, with major booking and streaming reach.

name: Get Physical
requirements: Demo submissions ONLY via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Three-decade Berlin house/tech house institution with deep catalogue and scene respect.

name: Rekids
requirements: Send new, ideally sample-free music
why_it_belongs: Radio Slave's respected UK label (since 2006) — strong underground techno/house credibility.

name: Yoshitoshi Recordings
requirements: Demo email demos@yoshitoshi.com (a Label-Worx form is also referenced)
why_it_belongs: Long-running, highly respected house/tech house label (Deep Dish) with global reach.

name: Lost Records
requirements: SoundCloud links ONLY
why_it_belongs: CamelPhat's label — a fast-rising melodic/tech house brand with big chart presence.

name: All Day I Dream
why_it_belongs: Lee Burridge's label — the defining organic/melodic house brand and event series.

name: Under No Illusion
requirements: 'All demos to' the demo email
why_it_belongs: Eli Brown's label — one of the hottest current tech house/techno crossover names.

name: Roush Label
requirements: Submit up to 5 tracks via the on-site demo portal (15-day window)
why_it_belongs: Consistent tech house imprint with reliable Beatport presence; openly demo-friendly.

name: Abode Records
requirements: Submit via the ABODE Records Trackstack portal
why_it_belongs: Strong UK tech house party brand and label; actively solicits demos.

name: Eastenderz
why_it_belongs: East End Dubs' label — a leader in the minimal/tech house ('minimal dub') wave.

name: PIV Records
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Amsterdam tech/deep house label (since 2014) with a distinctive, well-regarded sound.

name: Heldeep
requirements: Drop an MP3 via the LabelRadar 'Drop Your Demo' portal
why_it_belongs: Oliver Heldens' label — high-profile, with major streaming and festival reach.

name: Perfect Havoc
requirements: Upload via the on-site portal | They listen to everything but cannot reply to each
why_it_belongs: UK house/dance-pop label with a track record of breaking new artists (e.g. Joel Corry).

name: Nervous Records
requirements: Check the label site for current submission guidelines before sending
why_it_belongs: Iconic NYC house institution (since 1991) — deep heritage and ongoing releases.

name: Hottrax
requirements: Submit via the Hottrax Trackstack portal (linked from the label's socials)
why_it_belongs: Jamie Jones' more club-focused label (sister to Hot Creations) — actively scouts producers.
